examples: They protested that there was no place for a school of commerce in their hallowed halls of learning.
“Our Father in heaven, hallowed by your name ….
Hallowed laws, regulations, standards and memes will evaporate.
Ethanol has achieved hallowed status in the battle to reduce the U.S.' dependence on imported oil.
Lavin runs this hallowed institution in a Catholic town in Newfoundland with deceptive efficiency.
